name: U.S. GOLD CORP.
business: U.S. Gold Corp. is a gold, copper, and precious metals development and exploration company. Its primary asset is the CK Gold Project in Wyoming, which contains proven and probable mineral reserves and is proposed as an open-pit mine producing copper concentrate containing gold, copper, and silver. The company also holds exploration-stage properties in Nevada and Idaho and currently has no revenue-generating operations.

exposures.sentence: We are a gold, copper and precious metals development and exploration company pursuing exploration opportunities primarily in Wyoming, Nevada and Idaho.
The CK Gold Project's property contains proven and probable mineral reserves and accordingly is classified as a development stage property.

catalysts.sentence: Advancing toward FS completion by the end of 2025, with key groundwork already completed to facilitate fast-tracking.
